summary: Small documentation-only cleanup in CONTRIBUTING.md. The PR fixed a typo in the Pull Requests guidance, changing "it'a easier" to "it's easier", and converted a plain decomp.me mention into an explicit Markdown link to https://decomp.me/. No code, matching, or decompilation behavior changed.
what_changed: In the Pull Requests section of CONTRIBUTING.md, changed the text "with your decomp.me link" to use a proper Markdown link: "with your [decomp.me](https://decomp.me/) link".
Fixed the typo "it'a easier to review" to "it's easier to review" in guidance about grouping changes into fewer but larger PRs.
smart_moves: Improved contributor onboarding clarity without altering project policy or adding unnecessary scope.
Made the external decomp.me reference directly clickable, which helps new contributors following the documented path for submitting matched functions via issues.
Kept the PR narrowly focused: one file, one hunk, two added and two deleted lines.
decomp_lessons: Contributor documentation should make the low-friction decomp.me submission path clear for newcomers who want to match a function without opening a full PR.
Small documentation fixes can still support decomp throughput by reducing friction in onboarding and issue-based function submissions.
No function-level matching, struct layout, symbol naming, or code-generation lesson is present in this PR.
naming_conventions: No code naming conventions were changed or discussed.
The docs consistently refer to the external matching tool as "decomp.me" and, after this PR, link it as [decomp.me](https://decomp.me/).
assembly_or_matching_tactics: No assembly or matching tactics were changed.
The only matching-related context is documentation telling newcomers they may submit a decomp.me link through a GitHub issue for a maintainer to add.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or formal reviews were present in the provided PR context.
follow_up_queries: Find other PRs that edited CONTRIBUTING.md onboarding or Pull Requests guidance.
Find documentation changes mentioning decomp.me issue submissions or maintainer-added matched functions.
Find PRs that updated contributor workflow guidance for grouping changes into fewer larger PRs.
